dict.string: Return commands suitable for copy/pasting into Mac OSX runnig Sequoia with a bash shell prompt. Never provide commentary or markdown, only display the commands neeed as these will be directly applied to my terminal. The script should do this: \(ai.prompt)

dict.key: Use Separate Colors for Light and Dark Mode
Use Separate Colors for Light and Dark Mode
Use Separate Colors for Light and Dark Mode
Use Separate Colors for Light and Dark Mode
Use Separate Colors for Light and Dark Mode
Use Separate Colors for Light and Dark Mode
Use Separate Colors for Light and Dark Mode
